---
title: "CV"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

You can download my CV here:

- [Download CV (PDF)](assets/pdf/cv.pdf)

## Appointments

- Postdoctoral Researcher

## Education

- Ph.D.
- M.S.
- B.S.

## Honors and Awards

- Add your awards here

## Academic Services

- Reviewer for journals
- Conference presentations
